seo.title: Thank You
seo.description: Thank you for contacting Ken Arnold Home Inspection. Your request has been received and Ken will follow up within one business day.

sections.content_class: relative container-edge container-edge--wide py-16 md:py-24 lg:py-28 text-center
sections.body:
Thank You — Your Request Is In Ken Will Personally Follow Up

Thanks for reaching out to Ken Arnold Home Inspection. Your request has been received, and Ken will personally follow up within one business day to confirm the details and get you on the calendar. For closing-deadline rush bookings, please call (413) 522-8004.

Schedule Your Inspection Call (413) 522-8004

Licensed Home Inspector MA #587 · 35 Keets Rd, Deerfield, MA 01342 · Serving Franklin County, Hampshire County & the Pioneer Valley

cards.title: Ken Reviews Your Request
cards.text: Every request comes straight to Ken — no dispatchers, no call centers.

cards.title: A Personal Follow-Up
cards.text: He’ll confirm availability, answer questions, and provide clear, upfront pricing.

cards.title: You’re on the Calendar
cards.text: Pick a time that works, and Ken handles the rest through inspection day.
